reference: so let me see if the model changed or not 我们看一下模型是否改变了
notes: English first half + Chinese second half. Both engines previously translated Chinese part to English when initial_prompt contained English vocabulary.
Pure Chinese. FunASR previously translated to 'I wonder why.' due to anti-translation prompt bug.
Short Chinese utterance. FunASR translates to 'So, what's the matter?' — model-level translation bug.
Starts with English 'so' then Chinese. Both engines prone to translating entire utterance to English.
